revision.text:
[[ja:稲爪神社]] {{Expand Japanese|稲爪神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Inazume Shrine | native_name = 稲爪神社 | image = Inazume shrine.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Inazume Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.646236|135.004265}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|az|Ooyamatsimu|de|Ōyamatsumi|en|Ōyamatsumi|fa|اویاماتسومی|fr|Ōyamatsumi|hr|O-Yama-Tsu-mi|ja|オオヤマツミ|ko|오야마쓰미노카미|mni|ꯑꯣꯌꯃꯠꯁꯨꯃꯤ|ru|Ооямацуми|simple|Ōyamatsumi|sv|Ōyamatsumi|zh|大山津見|qid=Q386563|1=Ōyamatsumi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Inazume Shrine'''|稲爪神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Harima Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11498723|ltq=Q11498723|qid=Q11498723|1=List of Shikinaisha in Harima Province}} ** Series ordinal: 7 ** P155: {{ill|Akaba Shrine|lt=Akaba Shrine|ja|赤羽神社|qid=Q20042898|1=Akaba Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11505275|ltq=Q11505275|qid=Q11505275|1=Hioka Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q26406|ltq=Q26406|qid=Q26406|1=Akashi, Hyōgo}} * {{ill|Harima Province|lt=Harima Province|be|Харыма (правінцыя)|ca|Província de Harima|ceb|Harima (baranggay sa Hapon)|cs|Provincie Harima|de|Provinz Harima|en|Harima Province|envoyage|Harima|es|Provincia de Harima|fa|ولایت هاریما|fr|Province de Harima|gl|Provincia de Harima|id|Provinsi Harima|it|Harima (provincia)|ja|播磨国|ko|하리마국|lt|Harimos žemė|nl|Harima (provincie)|pt|Província de Harima|ru|Харима (провинция)|simple|Harima Province|sk|Harima (provincia)|sr|Провинција Харима|tr|Harima (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Харіма|zh_min_nan|Harima-kok|zh|播磨國|qid=Q1047523|1=Harima Province}} * {{ill|Q11512561|ltq=Q11512561|qid=Q11512561|1=Akashi District, Hyōgo}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.646236|135.004265}} == image (P18) == * Inazume shrine.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q386563|ltq=Q386563|qid=Q386563|1=Ōyamatsumi}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183013 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Gō-sha|lt=Gō-sha|ja|郷社|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * いなづめじんじゃ == postal code (P281) == * 673-0874 == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4140005005588 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Iwatsuhimeno Shrine|lt=Iwatsuhimeno Shrine|qid=Q135041149|1=Iwatsuhimeno Shrine}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '兵庫県明石市大蔵本町6-10', 'language': 'ja'} == Japan Search name ID (P6698) == * 稲爪神社 [[JA:稲爪神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11596731}} == Japanese content == {{Citation needed|date=2018-05-16 (Wed) 10:15 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称=Inazume Shrine |画像=[[ファイル:Inazume shrine.jpg|270px]]
Haiden |所在地={{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|qid=Q130290|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Akashi|Q26406|qid=Q26406|1=Akashi, Hyōgo}}Ōkura Honmachi 6-10 |位置={{coord|34|38|46.5|N|135|0|14.8|E|region:JP|display=inline,title}} |祭神={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}
{{ill|lt=Omodaru|UNKNOWN|lt=Omodaru-no-Kami}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kashikone-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (small) candidate shrine
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |本殿={{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |創建=(trad.) reign of {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|qid=Q298057|1=Empress Suiko}} |例祭={{ill|lt=October 8|Q2924|qid=Q2924|1=October 8}} |神事=Kagura lion dance |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=Inazume Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Inazume Shrine''' (いなづめじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in Ōkura Honmachi, {{ill|lt=Akashi|Q26406|qid=Q26406|1=Akashi, Hyōgo}}, {{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|qid=Q130290|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. Its former rank under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} was gōsha. It is one of the shrines identified with Iwatsuhime Shrine in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}} *{{ill|lt=Omodaru|UNKNOWN|lt=Omodaru-no-Mikoto}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kashikone-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *{{ill|lt=Iwatsuhime|UNKNOWN|lt=Iwatsuhime-no-Mikoto}} *{{ill|lt=Okutsuhiko|UNKNOWN|lt=Okutsuhiko-no-Mikoto}} *{{ill|lt=Okutsuhime|UNKNOWN|lt=Okutsuhime-no-Mikoto}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Uru-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Origin === In the time of {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|qid=Q298057|1=Empress Suiko}}, iron men from {{ill|lt=Three Han|Q1376093|qid=Q1376093|1=Samhan}} invaded with 8,000 followers. Ochi Masami of {{ill|lt=Iyo Province|Q907829|qid=Q907829|1=Iyo Province}}, ordered to subdue them, prayed to Ōyamazumi deity of his home {{ill|lt=Ōyamazumi Shrine|Q703904|qid=Q703904|1=Ōyamazumi Shrine}}. When the iron men arrived at Akashi, Ōyamazumi appeared with lightning and told him to shoot the soles of their feet, their only weak point. Startled, the iron man was shot dead by Masami. In gratitude, Ochi Masami invited Ōyamazumi Shrine to the place where the deity appeared, and this is said to be the origin. In old times it was called Inazuma Daimyōjin; it is said "Inazuma" later shifted to "Inazume." Also, a shrine built by Masami's son Takeo to enshrine Masami's spirit is said to be today's Ōkura Hachiman Shrine. In {{ill|lt=1578|Q6707|qid=Q6707|1=1578}} ({{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|qid=Q1145058|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 6), shrine buildings burned in military fire during {{ill|lt=Takayama Ukon|Q749873|qid=Q749873|1=Justo Takayama}}'s attack on Ōkuradani Castle, and the shrine moved north as a temporary shrine. In {{ill|lt=1637|Q6889|qid=Q6889|1=1637}} ({{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|qid=Q1192913|1=Kan'ei}} 14), shrine buildings were rebuilt and moved back to the original site. At the temporary-shrine location, {{ill|lt=Matsudaira Mitsushige (Toda-Matsudaira family)|Q11530371|qid=Q11530371|lt=Matsudaira Mitsushige|1=Matsudaira Mitsushige}}, lord of {{ill|lt=Akashi Domain|Q839406|qid=Q839406|1=Akashi Domain}}, invited {{ill|lt=Kumano Gongen|Q11568925|qid=Q11568925|lt=Kumano Sansha Gongen|1=Kumano Gongen}}, creating Kumano Kō Shrine. In {{ill|lt=1977|Q2481|qid=Q2481|1=1977}} ({{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|qid=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 52), shrine buildings burned in an accidental fire, but were rebuilt in {{ill|lt=1979|Q2484|qid=Q2484|1=1979}} ({{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|qid=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 54). === Sessha === ; Inazumehama Ebisu Shrine *Location: within Inazume Shrine precincts *Deity: {{ill|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Kami|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} ; Ōkura Hachiman Shrine *Location: Ōkura Hachiman-chō, Akashi *Deity: Ochi Masami *Founded by: Ochi Takeo *Enshrines Ochi Masami, founder of Inazume Shrine. According to 'Akashi Meishō Kojidan,' it was formerly named Ochi Shrine, but in {{ill|lt=1705|Q6830|qid=Q6830|1=1705}} ({{ill|lt=Hōei|Q1145262|qid=Q1145262|1=Hōei}} 2), Akashi lord {{ill|lt=Matsudaira Naotsune|Q11530528|qid=Q11530528|1=Matsudaira Naotsune}} renamed it "Hotade Hachiman" and renovated shrine buildings. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, it was surrounded by forest, and artillery training of Akashi Domain was conducted in the eastern woods. ; Kumano Kō Shrine *Location: Higashi-Hitomaru-chō, Akashi *Deities: Kumano Sansha Gongen === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Kōno clan|Q11554232|qid=Q11554232|1=Kōno clan}} * {{ill|lt=Yoshōki|Q11371102|qid=Q11371102|1=Yoshōki}} === External links === * {{PDFlink|[https://www.kobegakuin.ac.jp/~card/chiiki/2012-houkokusyo-pdf/2012nendohokokusyo2.pdf Inazume Shrine autumn festival survey report]}} {{ill|lt=Kobe Gakuin University|Q6424308|qid=Q6424308|1=Kobe Gakuin University}}, 2012 {{shinto-stub}} ・[http://inadumejinjya-tetsujin.com/ Inazume Shrine Summer Purification Festival] == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Inazume Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Inazume Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Harima Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Category:明石市の歴史]] [[Category:明石市の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Harima Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Category:Mishima–Ōyamazumi cult]]
